name: Wood Paper Towel Holder Black - Threshold™: Freestanding Kitchen Holder, Wood & Steel, 13" Height, Spot Clean
description: Store and display your paper towels in sleek style with this Wood Paper Towel Holder from Threshold™. This wooden paper towel holder features a simple circular base with a wooden column that combines style and functionality for your kitchen countertops. Made from wood in a natural finish, this paper towel blends seamlessly with all decor styles, giving your kitchen counter a timeless upgrade.
